never: Never create files inside src/. All test files go in tests/ only.
Never write assert!(true) or assert!(false) as the only assertion in a test. Every test must assert on a real observable value.
Never instantiate State structs directly. State is private. Use Actor::spawn to create actors.
Never call taskfile.mark_done unless cargo test reports N > 0 tests passing with zero failures.
Never skip a test with a comment saying setup is complex. Either write the test or mark it #[ignore] with a specific reason.
always: Read the source file completely before writing any test for it.
Run cargo check after writing each test file. Fix all errors before moving on.
Test through the mailbox. The Msg enum IS the public API of an Actor.

current_task.notes: Same actor model approach. See cassini/types/tests/ for proptest style reference.

locate.description: Fast symbol location — returns file paths and line numbers. Use FIRST to find WHERE something is.
locate.find_actors: rg -n 'impl Actor for|pub struct.*Msg|pub struct.*Args|pub enum.*Msg' $WORKSPACE_ROOT/{crate_path}/src --type rust
locate.find_symbol: rg -n 'pub fn |pub struct |pub enum |pub trait ' $WORKSPACE_ROOT/{crate_path}/src --type rust

extract.description: Precise content extraction. Read partial files with line ranges to avoid loading large files entirely.

completed.notes: All passing — unit tests and property tests including rkyv roundtrips, serde roundtrips, boundary conditions
